frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent technique with appropriate hand switching

Single throw with proper hand switching

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well-closed with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Excellent technique demonstrated with proper surgeon's knot, correct hand switching, and accurate suture placement. Task completed efficiently with good instrument control.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly more precise needle placement to minimize deviation from marks
Work on maintaining consistent tension during knot tightening
